originalAlarm.description: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value

reasoning: 061fd0a353e.c L27: 'Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value'. p is declared but uninitialized at L7. In 'case R' (when HDPARM_SCAN_HWIF=T), 'if(!p)' at L27 evaluates p which is uninitialized (p is only set in 'case W' which is a different switch branch). PC: CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF=T (UNREGISTER cancels — both T and F variants present). New bug (the // ERROR is at L20-21 in the UNREGISTER path; L27 in the SCAN path has no ERROR comment). Correctly constrained PC.
